name: markdown-editor
description: Full-featured markdown editor with WYSIWYG (ProseMirror) and markup (CodeMirror) modes, split preview, toolbar, and YFM (Yandex Flavored Markdown) extension support.
when_to_use: Full-featured markdown editor with WYSIWYG (ProseMirror) and markup (CodeMirror) modes, split preview, toolbar, and YFM (Yandex Flavored Markdown) extension support
avoid: Not for read-only markdown rendering — use @diplodoc/transform or similar. Requires a useMarkdownEditor instance — not a drop-in textarea replacement.

name: MarkdownEditorView
description: The main React view component for the Gravity UI markdown editor. Renders a toolbar, WYSIWYG or markup editing area, and optional split-mode preview based on the editor mode. Must be paired with a MarkdownEditorInstance created by useMarkdownEditor.
when_to_use: When building a markdown editor in a React application
For content authoring interfaces that need both WYSIWYG and raw markdown modes
When YFM (Yandex Flavored Markdown) support is required
avoid: Without a useMarkdownEditor instance — the editor prop is required
For read-only markdown rendering — use @diplodoc/transform or similar instead

props.name: editor
props.description: Editor instance created by useMarkdownEditor hook

props.name: autofocus
props.description: Whether to focus the editor on mount

props.name: stickyToolbar
props.description: Whether the toolbar sticks to top when scrolling (default true)

props.name: toolbarsPreset
props.description: Preset configuration for toolbar button sets

props.name: wysiwygHiddenActionsConfig
props.description: Hidden action items for WYSIWYG mode

props.name: markupHiddenActionsConfig
props.description: Hidden action items for markup mode

props.name: settingsVisible
props.description: Whether to show the editor settings panel

props.name: enableSubmitInPreview
props.description: Allow submit action in preview mode

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the editor wrapper

name: useMarkdownEditor
description: Creates and memoizes a MarkdownEditorInstance that manages editor state, mode switching, extensions, and content serialization. The returned instance is passed to MarkdownEditorView for rendering.
when_to_use: As the factory for all MarkdownEditorView instances
When you need programmatic access to editor value, mode, or events
avoid: Calling inside render loops without stable deps — use useMemo or the deps parameter

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Editor options including md config, initial content, handlers, extensions, preset, and experimental flags

parameters.name: deps
parameters.description: Optional dependency array that triggers editor recreation when changed (default [])

return_type: MarkdownEditorInstance — has getValue(), setValue(), focus(), setMode(), on(), off(), emit() and more
